Get combined historical time-series (TVL, share price, base APY) for a vault, bucketed by interval over [from, to].

parameters.name: step
parameters.description: Point spacing (granularity) in seconds. Defaults to 86400 (1 day)

schema.description: Point spacing (granularity) in seconds. Defaults to 86400 (1 day)

parameters.name: apyInterval
parameters.description: APY/APR trailing window (lookback) in seconds, independent of step. Defaults to 2592000 (30 days)

schema.description: APY/APR trailing window (lookback) in seconds, independent of step. Defaults to 2592000 (30 days)

get.description: Simple-rate (non-compound) APR per point over [from, to]. Each point annualises share-price growth over the trailing apyInterval window (seconds); points are spaced by step (granularity), independent of apyInterval. Reward APR is reserved for future rewards indexing and is always 0. Returns 503 while the vault's position is being re-indexed.

Returns supported DeFi protocols with pagination. A protocol is an organization referenced as a lending protocol or vault infra provider in an earn product.
Get streams, optionally filtered by stream ID or organization ID.

post.summary: Create Stream with API Key Authentication
post.description: Handle create stream and signature request

Get streams filtered by multiple stream IDs, organization IDs, target-token chains and/or target tokens. Same stream objects as GET /streams. Pagination is optional via the `page` and `limit` query params (`limit` is capped at 500); omit both to return all matching streams, except when no filter is provided, in which case a bounded `limit` is required. Uses POST because the multi-valued filters are sent in the request body; it is a read-only query and is not scoped to the API key's organization.

get.description:
Retrieve Merkle proofs for a wallet address across multiple streams.
	
	The endpoint returns proofs for the latest snapshot with a committed root hash for each stream.
	The proofs can be used to claim rewards on-chain.
	
	**Caching Strategy:**
	1. Check local in-memory LRU cache (LRU eviction ensures memory stays bounded)
	2. If not in cache, check Redis
	3. If not in Redis, rebuild from database
	4. Validate root hash matches the database value
Get points, optionally filtered by organization ID.

post.description: Create a point for the organization associated with the API key.

get.description: Get all supported tokens for a chain that can be used for streams.

Retrieve all streams a wallet is participating in with its snapshot data per stream. By default only the latest snapshot per stream is returned; set withSnapshots=true to include full history. rewardsAccumulated and rewardsAccumulatedBase are in wei units.

Retrieve the wallets participating in a stream along with their latest snapshot data. Paginate with 'page' and 'limit' query params (default: page=1, limit=20). Results are ordered by rewardsAccumulated descending. rewardsAccumulated and rewardsAccumulatedBase are in wei units.

Retrieve all reward snapshots accumulated by a wallet for a specific stream. The following fields are in wei units: wallet.snapshots[].rewardsAccumulated, wallet.stream.totalAmount, wallet.stream.lastSnapshot.amountDistributed.

mode.description: Mode: 'swap' to use router, 'direct' for direct deposit

tag.description: The tracking tag found in the transaction

amount.description: Shares to redeem in smallest unit

slippageBps.description: Optional: slippage tolerance in basis points (e.g., 50 = 0.5%). Only applied to opportunities that require it

tokenOut.description: Optional: token to receive after withdrawal (required for Midas, Mellow, Veda)

base.description: APR from share-price growth alone (simple, non-compound)

reward.description: Reward APR; reserved for future rewards indexing, currently always 0

null when the vault has no snapshots yet or the underlying token is not registered in supported_tokens
